title: High Command (disambiguation)
content:
'''High Command''' was a term that referred to the top echelon of leaders of a military or paramilitary organization. Specifically, High Command can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Alliance High Command]]'''
*'''[[First Order High Command]]'''
*'''[[Imperial High Command]]'''
*'''[[Jedi high command]]'''
*'''[[New Republic High Command]]'''
*'''[[Republic High Command]]'''
*'''[[Resistance High Command]]'''

==Legends==
*[[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]]
**[[High Command Advisory Council]]
*[[Bothan High Command]]
*[[Corellian High Command]]
*[[Galactic Alliance High Command]]
*[[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial High Command]]
*[[ISB high command]]
*[[New Republic High Command/Legends|New Republic High Command]]
*[[Republic High Command/Legends|Republic High Command]]
*[[Smuggler High Command]]
*[[Thaereian High Command]]
*[[Yinchorri High Command]]
